name: MM/GB(PB)SA
description: Calculate binding free energy between protein and ligand or protein and protein using MM/GB(PB)SA. Supports energy minimization (fast scoring) or full MD simulation (averaged over trajectory frames). Choose between Generalized Born (GB) or Poisson-Boltzmann (PB) solvation models.
capabilities: Calculate binding free energy between protein and ligand or protein and protein using MM/GB(PB)SA
Supports energy minimization (fast scoring) or full MD simulation (averaged over trajectory frames)
Choose between Generalized Born (GB) or Poisson-Boltzmann (PB) solvation models

complex_structure.description: Protein-ligand or protein-protein complex structure in PDB format

receptor_chain.description: Chain ID(s) for the receptor protein

ligand_chain.description: Chain ID or residue name for the ligand

solvation_model.description: Solvation model to use for free energy calculation

simulation_mode.description: Calculation mode: energy minimization (fast) or full MD simulation (accurate)

num_frames.description: Number of MD trajectory frames to average over (only for md mode)
